---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []

---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear description of what you'd like to see added.

## 🎯 Use Case
Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

**Example:**
"I have 50+ duplicate photos from different cameras and need to find visually similar images, not just identical files."

## 📋 Roadmap Check
- [ ] I've checked the [roadmap](../../../ROADMAP.md) and this feature isn't already planned
- [ ] This is a new idea not covered in existing issues

## 💭 Possible Implementation
(Optional) Any thoughts on how this could work?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
What workarounds are you currently using? What other tools do this?

## 📊 Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] **Critical** - I can't use diskcomp without this
- [ ] **High** - Would significantly improve my workflow  
- [ ] **Medium** - Would be nice to have
- [ ] **Low** - Minor improvement

## 🤝 Contribution
- [ ] I'm willing to help implement this feature
- [ ] I can provide testing/feedback during development
- [ ] I'm just suggesting the idea
